verdict.summary: The round-1 defects are resolved. Sub-threshold network-unknown streaks are now persisted in a repository variable and the tests explicitly verify that the first two unknowns perform no issue mutation; the alert issue is created or reopened only at the threshold. This also removes the create-output parsing path that could strand a newly created issue open. The implementation keeps probe-health paging distinct from the credential verdict, fails red on state/alert read or write failures, resets only on definitive probe results, preserves exact-title issue matching, and exercises the meaningful transition and failure paths with non-vacuous assertions. The workflow permission expansion is explained and scoped to the repository-variable API used by the change.
